labels.notes: James Fredrick Dollery 1:46pm — left-sided radiculopathy with leg radiation; ONE trigger-point injection performed. DEFECTS: (1) Class I SOAP P/PROCEDURE CONTRADICTION — P-section says 'Hold off on further injections at this time' but Procedure-section says 'Performed injection at left-sided painful spot'. Transcript shows the doctor verbalized the decision flip mid-sentence ('Did you want to do an injection? Yeah. Do you wanna hold off Just file it in the pocket. Come on up.'); SOAP-model captured both halves into different sections. Fix: post-SOAP cross-section consistency check — when P-section claims 'no procedure today / hold off / deferred' and Procedure-section lists a performed procedure, prefer Procedure as authoritative and emit `soap_contradiction_detected` event (or regenerate). (2) Class B dx 729 (fibrositis) wrong — should be 724 (lumbago/sciatica) for radiculopathy with leg radiation. Same DX_SYNONYMS gap as Carl. Billing OK given that an injection WAS in fact performed.
